title: Reply Agent Output (v1)
description: Documentation-level canonical schema for Reply Agent output in the gile-agents v1 pipeline. Mirrors the Reply Agent → GILE contract in agents/HANDOFF_CONTRACTS.md.

draft_text.description: Full draft produced from the plan, prior to GILE refinement.

draft_language.description: Language code used for the draft before GILE (e.g. ka-GE).

requires_gile.description: Indicates whether GILE refinement is required.

gile_action.description: Requested refinement action when requires_gile is true (e.g. refine_language, enforce_institutional_style).

style_hints.description: Optional hints for GILE about target style nuances.

redaction_notes.description: Optional notes on what must not be added or altered by GILE.

segment_map.description: Optional mapping between parts of draft_text and plan sections to preserve structure.

source_plan.description: Opaque reference to the planning structure used to generate the draft.
